advice.cold: 🧥 Very cold — wear a heavy coat or down jacket
advice.cool: 🧣 A bit chilly — bring a jacket
advice.mild: 👕 Comfortable — a light layer or long sleeves will do
advice.hot: ☀️ Hot — go with shorts and a tee
advice.snow: ❄️ Snow expected — watch for slippery roads and stay warm
advice.uv_extreme: 🧴 Extreme UV — sunscreen is a must

summary.vpn_hint: (Proxy detected — IP shows {ip_city}, auto-switched to system timezone location)

error.no_location: Unable to determine location — please specify a city name
error.city_not_found: City not found — please check the city name
error.geocode_timeout: City lookup timed out — please try again or specify a city name
error.geocode_failed: City lookup failed — please check your network
error.forecast_timeout: Weather data request timed out — please try again

nearby.no_query: Please enter a search keyword (e.g. restaurant, cafe, park)

recipe.no_query: Please enter a dish name or ingredient
recipe.random_fail: Failed to get a random recipe, please try again later

air_quality.fetch_failed: Failed to get air quality data for {city}

currency.no_currencies: Please specify source and target currencies

panel.title: LifeKit
panel.subtitle: Manage base settings and saved locations while keeping weather, route, nearby search, and other tools available.
panel.config.title: Configuration
panel.locations.title: Saved locations
panel.locations.empty.title: No saved locations
panel.locations.empty.description: Add a location so weather and travel tools can prefer your default place.
panel.add.title: Add location
panel.add.tip: Adding a location performs city geocoding, so network access is required.
panel.store.disabled: Plugin storage is disabled. Saved locations will be empty and new locations cannot be saved.
panel.fields.defaultCityHelp: Leave empty to prefer saved default location, IP lookup, or system timezone.
panel.fields.label: Label
panel.fields.addressHelp: Optional, useful for distinguishing places in the same city.
panel.placeholders.label: e.g. Home, Office, School
panel.errors.labelCityRequired: Please fill in label and city
panel.errors.actionUnavailable: The action is not exposed to this panel. Refresh and try again.
panel.columns.label: Label
actions.getConfig.label: Get config
actions.updateConfig.label: Save config
actions.addLocation.label: Add location
actions.removeLocation.label: Remove location
actions.setDefaultLocation.label: Set default
entries.getConfig.name: Get config
entries.updateConfig.name: Update config
entries.addLocation.name: Add saved location
entries.addLocation.description: Add a saved location by label and city, geocoding coordinates automatically.
entries.removeLocation.name: Remove saved location
entries.removeLocation.description: Remove a saved location by ID or label.
entries.setDefaultLocation.name: Set default location
entries.setDefaultLocation.description: Set the location preferred by weather and travel tools.
fields.locationLabel.description: Location label, such as Home or Office
fields.setDefault.description: Whether to set this location as default
quickstart.title: LifeKit Complete Guide
quickstart.subtitle: A complete guide to settings, saved locations, weather, travel, food, dates, currency, and unit tools.
quickstart.cards.configure.title: Configure defaults first
quickstart.cards.configure.body: Set the default city, timezone, forecast days, and language. When default city is empty, LifeKit prefers saved locations, IP lookup, or system timezone.
quickstart.cards.locations.title: Save common places
quickstart.cards.locations.body: Save Home, Office, School, and other common places. Weather and travel tools prefer the default location.
quickstart.cards.tools.title: Use tools for daily tasks
quickstart.cards.tools.body: Call weather, hourly forecasts, route planning, nearby search, recipes, currency conversion, and unit conversion from quick actions or chat.
quickstart.alert.storeEnabled: Plugin storage is enabled. Saved locations can be persisted.
quickstart.alert.storeDisabled: Plugin storage is disabled. Saved location management is unavailable.
quickstart.path.title: Recommended path
quickstart.path.openPanel.title: Open the panel
quickstart.path.openPanel.body: Open the LifeKit panel from plugin details and check storage status and current locale first.
quickstart.path.configure.title: Save base settings
quickstart.path.configure.body: Set default city, timezone, and forecast days as needed. Empty language follows the main UI or system environment.
quickstart.path.addLocations.title: Add saved locations
quickstart.path.addLocations.body: Add labeled cities or addresses, then set your most-used place as default.
quickstart.path.useTools.title: Call LifeKit tools
quickstart.path.useTools.body: Search quick actions for weather, route, nearby, food, recipe, countdown, currency, or unit conversion.
quickstart.path.review.title: Follow up from results
quickstart.path.review.body: LifeKit tools return summaries and next_actions, making follow-up questions about routes, food, and weather natural.
quickstart.tools.weather.title: Weather and travel
quickstart.tools.weather.body: These entries work around cities, saved defaults, and forecast data.
quickstart.tools.weather.current: Get current weather and daily forecast.
quickstart.tools.weather.hourly: Check the next 48 hours of temperature, rain probability, and wind.
quickstart.tools.weather.travel: Get clothing, umbrella, UV, and travel suggestions from weather.
quickstart.tools.places.title: Places, routes, and nearby
quickstart.tools.places.body: These entries help plan trips, find shops, and organize routes.
quickstart.tools.places.nearby: Search nearby restaurants, cafes, supermarkets, and other POIs.
quickstart.tools.places.trip: Plan a route between origin and destination, including saved defaults.
quickstart.tools.places.food: Recommend nearby food by cuisine, scene, and location.
quickstart.tools.everyday.title: More everyday tools
quickstart.tools.everyday.recipe.title: Recipes
quickstart.tools.everyday.recipe.body: Search recipes or get a random meal idea.
quickstart.tools.everyday.calendar.title: Dates
quickstart.tools.everyday.calendar.body: Calculate countdowns, anniversaries, and days between dates.
quickstart.tools.everyday.convert.title: Conversions
quickstart.tools.everyday.convert.body: Convert currencies and common units like length, weight, and temperature.
quickstart.current.title: Current status
quickstart.faq.title: FAQ
quickstart.faq.noLocation: If location cannot be determined, specify a city manually or set a default saved location.
quickstart.faq.routeKeys: Transit routes usually require AMap or Baidu Map keys. Without keys, OSRM walking, cycling, and driving routes can still work.
quickstart.faq.locale: Empty language follows the main UI. Force language ignores the main UI language.
quickstart.next.title: Next steps
quickstart.next.body: After the basics, search for specific tools in quick actions or maintain defaults from the panel.
quickstart.next.entriesValue: Weather, travel, places, food, dates, currency, unit conversion
quickstart.warning.network: Weather, location, route, food, and recipe features call external services. If requests fail, check network, proxy, and map API keys first.
